steps.title: Identify what the question needs
steps.content: The question asks which choice best emphasizes a difference between Ricky Quiñones and John Catchings. From the notes: Quiñones played guitar, Catchings played cello — different instruments on different albums.

steps.title: Eliminate the choices
steps.content:
• Choice A — 'Ricky Quiñones and John Catchings have both lent their musical talents to albums by India Arie.': Emphasizes a similarity (both contributed), not a difference. ✗
  • Choice B — 'Both musicians have played on India Arie albums, but Ricky Quiñones played guitar, whereas John Catchings played cello.': Uses but and whereas to directly contrast their instruments. This is the key difference from the notes. ✓
  • Choice C — 'Ricky Quiñones played on India Arie's second studio album, Voyage to India, which was released one year after her album Acoustic Soul.': Mentions only Quiñones and focuses on album release timing, not the difference between the two musicians. ✗
  • Choice D — 'Acoustic Soul and Voyage to India, released in 2001 and 2002, respectively, are albums by singer and songwriter India Arie.': Neither musician is mentioned; the focus is on the albums. ✗
That matches choice B — B is correct.
